name: relentless-inception-grok
description: Grok Build edition of the long-running autonomous orchestrator skill: plans, builds, adversarially reviews, ships, and resurrects multi-day coding runs on xAI's Grok Build CLI. Signature feature is multi-model fusion-deliberation gates (panel -> judge -> fuser) on every plan/phase/summarize checkpoint, with a three-vendor default panel (grok-4.5 + gpt-5.6-sol + fable-5).
